name: Shopify store owners processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Shopify store owners processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes late orders. We automate data formatting instead of manual data entry into CRM systems.
problem_solved: Inability to efficiently format customer data for CRM systems

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to efficiently format customer data for CRM systems

locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual data entry into CRM systems
